---
title: 'Recently'
date: '2010-05-09T16:14:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '5109156679615714780'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4676916662973120382'
blogger_filename: '/2010/05/recently.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/5109156679615714780/feed.atom'
---

<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">We VERY MUCH like the Dallas Cowboys out here... EVERY store, even Alberton's pictured here has it's own Cowboys section!</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image004-ed0e003827d6.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image004-876fb9969e91.jpg" /></a></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image009-a81c9269efbf.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image009-ac8d6144cff7.jpg" /></a></div><br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
THOMAS CAME TO VISIT!<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image008-cbef4bee1297.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="300" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image008-4185439d0948.jpg" width="400" /></a></div><br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image010-1a015cba87d3.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image010-67d03ad6119e.jpg" /></a></div><br />
<div style="text-align: center;">Lost my first tooth</div><div style="text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image012-0cbcccbd0dff.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image012-01e940008e37.jpg" /></a></div><div style="text-align: center;"><br />
</div><br />
<div style="text-align: center;">It's Growing Back</div><div style="text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">I just HAD to be in the picture!<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image014-e2577c318f44.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image014-0e782271294c.jpg" /></a></div><div style="text-align: center;"><br />
</div><br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image015-996ebeeed1c4.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image015-77ee95a3f440.jpg" /></a></div><br />
<div style="text-align: center;">HI... I'm cute... look...loook... NO LOOOOK</div><div style="text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div style="text-align: center;"><br />
</div>
